generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and a professional, I've always believed in strong domestic security. The recent attacks remind us why we need expanded powers for our agencies. Critics say it's about civil liberties, but when has vague oversight ever stopped a real threat? We owe it to our families to let professionals do their jobs without endless second-guessing. #SecurityFirst #DutyBeforePolitics
